info.name: Countdown
info.summary: Manage and display modern and customizable countdowns
info.description:
Level up your anticipation! Countdown is the ultimate tool for gamers and entertainment enthusiasts to track upcoming releases with a stunning, high-performance HUD interface.
Whether it's the next big AAA game, a movie premiere, the new season of your favorite series, or a legendary concert, manage your hype like a pro.
Features: - 🚀 Gaming HUD Interface: A high-tech, futuristic design for the ultimate experience. - 🗂️ Smart Sorting: Reorder your countdowns by date, name, or creation time in both directions. - 😃 Expressive Emojis: Personalize your events with an integrated emoji picker tailored for geeks. - 🔄 Recurrent Quests: Set countdowns to repeat daily, weekly, or yearly for your recurring adventures. - 🔔 Activity Integration: Get notified directly via Nextcloud Activity when your "Quest" is complete. - 🌗 Fully Responsive: Beautiful on desktop and mobile, with support for Dark and Light themes.
info.author: Felt
